enabled.name: Addon Enabled
enabled.description: Enables or disables the entire addon.

blitzerEnabled.name: Speed Camera Warner
blitzerEnabled.description: Warns you when approaching a speed camera.

blitzerSound.name: Warning Sound
blitzerSound.description: Plays a sound when approaching a speed camera.

blitzerWarnDistance.name: Warning Distance
blitzerWarnDistance.description: Distance in blocks at which you are warned.

hudEnabled.name: HUD Enabled
hudEnabled.description: Shows speed camera warnings as a HUD element.
